## Summary

Summary of what was changed or added.

- If it's a feature: screenshots, etc.
- If it's a refactor: explain the rationale, why, how, etc.

## Issue ticket number and link
https://sanofi.atlassian.net/browse/DS2025-XXXX

## How can you test this?

Describe how to.

- If feature: happy path, edge cases, etc.
- If bug: how to reproduce.

## Checklist before requesting a review
- [ ] I reviewed my code before creating the PR.
- [ ] I wrote tests to cover my code.
- [ ] The new code does not generate new warnings or errors.
- [ ] Do we need to implement a feature flag?
- [ ] I've documented what's needed.
